name: Lasagna Rolls with Wilted Spinach (from My Garden)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet and sauté garlic until soft.
2. Add spinach and grated carrots; cook until the spinach is wilted.
3. Stir in currants and pine nuts.
4. Combine the vegetables with ricotta cheese in a bowl; season with salt and pepper.
5. Lay lasagna noodles flat on a surface.
6. Spread the mixture over the noodles.
7. Roll up the noodle to form a roll.
8. Place the rolled noodle on a serving dish or plate, spiral pattern facing upward.
9. Spoon marinara sauce over the roll.
10. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and serve.
